falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by 10% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above key long-term support would invalidate the 'bottom' pattern and suggest a bullish reversal, contradicting the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 30% above the 30-day average for three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the 84% similarity to a historical bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a rate cut of 50 basis points or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a dramatic policy shift would inject liquidity and invalidate the current HOLD signal by creating conditions opposite to those in the historical bottom pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
